ops.text: `ccx vcs ship` from a git-less jj workspace (cc-steer-w3) silently skips the prek hook gate ("hooks no-git") and its CI watch dies at `gh run list` ("failed to determine base repo: not a git repository") — the commit+push succeed but the two guardrails vanish. Ship should either colocate/borrow the store's git dir for hooks+gh or refuse loudly up front.
